title: Senior Doctor - Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute!
